map-entrance-auschwitz-desc: Start your tour here and continue in Birkenau.
map-entrance-birkenau-desc: You start the second part of your tour by the main Birkenau gate.
map-blok4-desc: Details about the mass murder of Jews at Auschwitz.
map-blok8-desc: Exhibition on emigration attempts and prisoner resistance.
map-gas-chamber-desc: Place of mass extermination and body burning.
map-main-gate-desc: The infamous entrance to Auschwitz I.
map-roll-call-desc: Daily roll calls under brutal conditions.
map-krematorium-ii-iii-desc: The largest extermination facilities in Birkenau.
map-wooden-barracks-desc: Blocks 14, 15, 16 and latrines in the BIIa quarantine sector of Birkenau.
map-brick-barracks-desc: Blocks 2, 3, 10, 16, 17 — brick barracks in the BIa sector of Birkenau.
map-parking-birkenau1: 40 PLN for vehicles not higher than 240 cm and 80 PLN for others.
map-parking-ride: Park & Ride by the railway station.
map-locate-unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser.
